en: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
zh: 太初有道，道與 神同在，道就是 神。

en: He was in the beginning with God.
zh: 這道太初與 神同在。

en: All things were made through him, and without him was not any thing made that was made.
zh: 萬有是藉著他造的；凡被造的，沒有一樣不是藉著他造的。

en: In him was life, and the life was the light of men.
zh: 在他裡面有生命， 這生命就是人的光。

en: The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness has not overcome it.
zh: 光照在黑暗中，黑暗不能勝過光。

en: There was a man sent from God, whose name was John.
zh: 有一個人，名叫約翰，是 神所差來的。

en: He came as a witness, to bear witness about the light, that all might believe through him.
zh: 他來是要作見證，就是為光作見證，使眾人藉著他可以相信。

en: He was not the light, but came to bear witness about the light.
zh: 他不是那光，而是要為那光作見證。

en: The true light, which enlightens everyone, was coming into the world.
zh: 那光來到世界，是普照世人的真光。

en: He was in the world, and the world was made through him, yet the world did not know him.
zh: 他在世界，世界也是藉著他造的，世界卻不認識他。

en: He came to his own, and his own people did not receive him.
zh: 他到自己的地方來，自己的人卻不接受他。

en: But to all who did receive him, who believed in his name, he gave the right to become children of God.
zh: 凡接受他的，就是信他名的人，他就賜給他們權利，成為 神的兒女。

en: who were born, not of blood nor of the will of the flesh nor of the will of man, but of God.
zh: 他們不是從血統生的，不是從肉身的意思生的，也不是從人意生的，而是從 神生的。

en: And the Word became flesh and dwelt among us, and we have seen his glory, glory as of the only Son from the Father, full of grace and truth.
zh: 道成了肉身，住在我們中間，滿有恩典和真理。我們見過他的榮光，正是從父而來的獨生子的榮光。

en: (John bore witness about him, and cried out, "This was he of whom I said, 'He who comes after me ranks before me, because he was before me.'")
zh: 約翰為他作見證，大聲說：“這一位就是我所說的：‘那在我以後來的，位分比我高，因為他本來是在我以前的。’”

en: And from his fullness we have all received, grace upon grace.
zh: 從他的豐盛裡我們都領受了，而且恩上加恩。

en: For the law was given through Moses; grace and truth came through Jesus Christ.
zh: 律法是藉著摩西頒布的，恩典和真理卻是藉著耶穌基督而來的。

en: No one has ever seen God; the only God, who is at the Father's side, he has made him known.
zh: 從來沒有人見過 神，只有在父懷裡的獨生子把他彰顯出來。

en: And this is the testimony of John, when the Jews sent priests and Levites from Jerusalem to ask him, "Who are you?"
zh: 以下是約翰的見證：猶太人從耶路撒冷派祭司和利未人到約翰那裡，問他：“你是誰？”

en: He confessed, and did not deny, but confessed, "I am not the Christ."
zh: 約翰並不否認，坦白地承認說：“我不是基督。”

en: And they asked him, "What then? Are you Elijah?" He said, "I am not." "Are you the Prophet?" And he answered, "No."
zh: 他們又問：“那麼你是誰？是以利亞嗎？”他說：“我不是。”“是那位先知嗎？”他回答：“不是。”

en: So they said to him, "Who are you? We need to give an answer to those who sent us. What do you say about yourself?"
zh: 於是他們再問：“你是誰？好讓我們回覆派我們來的人。你說你自己是誰？”

en: He said, "I am the voice of one crying out in the wilderness, 'Make straight the way of the Lord,' as the prophet Isaiah said."
zh: 他說：“我就是在曠野呼喊者的聲音：‘修直主的路！’正如以賽亞先知所說的。”

en: (Now they had been sent from the Pharisees.)
zh: 這些人是法利賽人派來的。

en: They asked him, "Then why are you baptizing, if you are neither the Christ, nor Elijah, nor the Prophet?"
zh: 他們問約翰：“你既然不是基督，不是以利亞，也不是那位先知，那麼你為甚麼施洗呢？”

en: John answered them, "I baptize with water, but among you stands one you do not know,
zh: 約翰回答：“我是用水施洗，但有一位站在你們中間，是你們不認識的；

en: even he who comes after me, the strap of whose sandal I am not worthy to untie."
zh: 他是在我以後來的，我就是給他解鞋帶也不配。”

en: These things took place in Bethany across the Jordan, where John was baptizing.
zh: 這些事發生在約旦河東的伯大尼，約翰施洗的地方。

en: The next day he saw Jesus coming toward him, and said, "Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world!
zh: 第二天，約翰見耶穌迎面而來，就說：“看哪， 神的羊羔，是除去世人的罪孽的！

en: This is he of whom I said, 'After me comes a man who ranks before me, because he was before me.'
zh: 這一位就是我所說的：‘有一個人，是在我以後來的，位分比我高，因為他本來是在我以前的。’

en: I myself did not know him, but for this purpose I came baptizing with water, that he might be revealed to Israel."
zh: 我本來不認識他，但為了要把他顯明給以色列人，因此我來用水施洗。”

en: And John bore witness: "I saw the Spirit descend from heaven like a dove, and it remained on him.
zh: 約翰又作見證說：“我曾看見聖靈，好像鴿子從天上降下來，停留在他的身上。

en: I myself did not know him, but he who sent me to baptize with water said to me, 'He on whom you see the Spirit descend and remain, this is he who baptizes with the Holy Spirit.'
zh: 我本來不認識他，但那差我來用水施洗的對我說：‘你看見聖靈降下來，停留在誰身上，誰就是用聖靈施洗的。’

en: And I have seen and have borne witness that this is the Son of God."
zh: 我看見了，就作見證說：‘這就是 神的兒子。’”

en: The next day again John was standing with two of his disciples,
zh: 過了一天，約翰和他的兩個門徒又站在那裡。

en: and he looked at Jesus as he walked by and said, "Behold, the Lamb of God!"
zh: 約翰看見耶穌走過的時候，就說：“看哪， 神的羊羔！”

en: The two disciples heard him say this, and they followed Jesus.
zh: 那兩個門徒聽見他的話，就跟從了耶穌。

en: Jesus turned and saw them following and said to them, "What are you seeking?" And they said to him, "Rabbi" (which means Teacher), "where are you staying?"
zh: 耶穌轉過身來，看見他們跟著，就問：“你們要甚麼？”他們說：“拉比，你在哪裡住？”

en: He said to them, "Come and you will see." So they came and saw where he was staying, and they stayed with him that day, for it was about the tenth hour.
zh: 他說：“你們來看吧！”於是他們就去看他所住的地方。那一天他們就和耶穌住在一起；那時大約是下午四點鐘。

en: One of the two who heard John speak and followed Jesus was Andrew, Simon Peter's brother.
zh: 聽了約翰的話而跟從耶穌的那兩個人，一個是西門．彼得的弟弟安得烈。

en: He first found his own brother Simon and said to him, "We have found the Messiah" (which means Christ).
zh: 他先找到自己的哥哥西門，告訴他：“我們遇見彌賽亞了！”

en: He brought him to Jesus. Jesus looked at him and said, "So you are Simon the son of John? You shall be called Cephas" (which means Peter).
zh: 安得烈就帶他到耶穌那裡。耶穌定睛看著他，說：“你是約翰的兒子西門，你要稱為磯法。”

en: The next day Jesus decided to go to Galilee. He found Philip and said to him, "Follow me."
zh: 再過一天，耶穌決定往加利利去；他遇見腓力，就對他說：“來跟從我！”

en: Now Philip was from Bethsaida, the city of Andrew and Peter.
zh: 腓力是伯賽大人，與安得烈和彼得同鄉。

en: Philip found Nathanael and said to him, "We have found him of whom Moses in the Law and also the prophets wrote, Jesus of Nazareth, the son of Joseph."
zh: 腓力找到拿但業，告訴他：“摩西在律法書上所寫的，和眾先知所記的那位，我們已經遇見了，他就是約瑟的兒子拿撒勒人耶穌。”

en: Nathanael said to him, "Can anything good come out of Nazareth?" Philip said to him, "Come and see."
zh: 拿但業說：“拿撒勒還能出甚麼好的嗎？”腓力說：“你來看！”

en: Jesus saw Nathanael coming toward him and said of him, "Behold, an Israelite indeed, in whom there is no deceit!"
zh: 耶穌看見拿但業向他走過來，就論到他說：“看哪，這的確是個以色列人，他心裡沒有詭詐。”

en: Nathanael said to him, "How do you know me?" Jesus answered him, "Before Philip called you, when you were under the fig tree, I saw you."
zh: 拿但業問他：“你怎麼認識我呢？”耶穌回答：“腓力還沒有招呼你，你在無花果樹下的時候，我就看見你了。”

en: Nathanael answered him, "Rabbi, you are the Son of God! You are the King of Israel!"
zh: 拿但業說：“拉比，你是 神的兒子，你是以色列的王！”

en: Jesus answered him, "Because I said to you, 'I saw you under the fig tree,' do you believe? You will see greater things than these."
zh: 耶穌說：“因為我告訴你‘我看見你在無花果樹下’，你就信了嗎？你還要看見比這些更大的事。”

en: And he said to him, "Truly, truly, I say to you, you will see heaven opened, and the angels of God ascending and descending on the Son of Man."
zh: 又對他說：“我實實在在告訴你們，你們要看見天開了， 神的眾使者在人子的身上，上去下來。”
